title: Frequently Asked <highlight>Questions</highlight>
subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions. Didn't find what you're looking for? Contact our team.

items.question: Is the platform really free?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a forever-free plan with 3 documents monthly. You can upgrade anytime for advanced features.

items.question: Do I need legal expertise to use it?
items.answer: Not at all. The platform is designed to be intuitive and easy for both beginners and professionals.

items.question: Can I get a refund after subscribing?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with the service.

items.question: Are prices in USD or my local currency?
items.answer: Prices are displayed in USD, but we support payments in multiple currencies via global payment gateways.

items.question: Are my data and documents secure?
items.answer: We use end-to-end encryption (AES-256) and never share your data. Our servers are ISO 27001 certified.

items.question: Does the site work on mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes, the platform is fully responsive and optimized for all modern devices and browsers.

items.question: Are the generated documents legally valid?
items.answer: Templates are drafted by certified lawyers and comply with local laws. We recommend reviewing them with your own legal advisor for complex cases.

items.question: Can I freely modify the templates?
items.answer: Yes, you can edit text, add custom clauses, and adjust formatting easily using our visual editor.

contact.response_time: We usually reply within an hour
